selfCheckNotes: Denominator recalc: checks with result != "N/A" = 35 items - 4 N/A (A-05, B-05, F-01, F-02, F-03, F-04 = 6 items wait 6 not 4) recounted: H-01/H-02/H-03 (H=3), A-01/A-02/A-03/A-04 (A=4, A-05=N/A), B-01/B-02/B-03/B-04 (B=4, B-05=N/A), C-01/C-02/C-03/C-04/C-05 (C=5), D-01 through D-06 (D=6), E-01 through E-06 (E=6), F-01/F-02/F-03/F-04 (F=4, of which F-01/F-02/F-03=N/A, F-04=YES so F count YES=1, N/A=3), G-01 (G=1). Total items: 3+4+4+5+6+6+4+1 = 33 items YES-or-NO, hence denominator should be 33 not 31. RECOUNT: A-05=N/A (4 YES + 1 N/A), B-05=N/A (4 YES + 1 N/A), C-05 YES (5 YES), D all YES (6), E all YES (6), F: F-01=N/A, F-02=N/A, F-03=N/A, F-04=YES (1 YES + 3 N/A), G-01=YES (1), H=3. Total: (4+1)+(4+1)+5+6+6+(1+3)+1+3 = 5+5+5+6+6+4+1+3=35 total items. YES count = 4+4+5+6+6+1+1+3 = 30. NO count = 0. N/A count = 1+1+0+0+0+3+0+0 = 5. denominator = YES + NO = 30 + 0 = 30. score = 30/30 × 100 = 100.0 ✓. failedChecks = empty array (no NO) ✓. JSON.parse verification: no unescaped quotes/backslashes in evidence strings (all evidence enclosed in "...", no nested quotes, line numbers prefixed L{N}). File encoding UTF-8 BOM-free per C-34. All three meta-gate H checks = YES → score not forced to 0. Passed = true (100.0 >= 95 threshold) ✓.
